q: What's the first thing you noticed about the other person?
If you two had a song, what genre would it be?
What do you secretly admire most about them?
Pick a vibe for your ideal date:
What's something small they do that makes your whole day?
options: Making me laugh out of nowhere
Remembering something I forgot I mentioned
The way they look at me when I'm not paying attention

q: If your relationship had a love language on max:
options: Physical touch — always reaching for each other
Acts — we just handle life together
Quality time — we could do nothing and it's enough

q: The thing you'd miss most if they disappeared tomorrow:
options: The inside jokes nobody else gets
How safe I feel around them
We make everything fun, even errands
